steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# I'll compute the requested financial indicators using the provided data.
from math import isfinite

# Input values from the tables (ÚLTIMO = 2024-12-31)
assets_total = 496325000000.0
current_assets = 83476000000.0
cash_and_equivalents = 30671000000.0
financial_investments = 331000000.0
receivables = 14600000000.0
inventories = 28513000000.0
taxes_recoverable = 6811000000.0
other_current_assets = 2550000000.0

non_current_assets = 412849000000.0
long_term_receivables = 71992000000.0
investments = 28158000000.0
property_plant_equipment = 247594000000.0
intangibles = 65105000000.0

liabilities_total = 496325000000.0
current_liabilities = 81055000000.0
suppliers = 26217000000.0
tax_obligations = 5743000000.0
current_loans = 7223000000.0
other_current = 5069000000.0
current_provisions = 30922000000.0

non_current_liabilities = 201550000000.0
non_current_loans = 88789000000.0
non_current_other = 2937000000.0
deferred_taxes = 2757000000.0
non_current_provisions = 107067000000.0

# Equity
equity_consolidated = 213720000000.0
# equity attributable to parent (Patrimônio Líq - Saldos Finais) from 5.07 is 206,772,000,000
equity_parent = 206772000000.0
non_controlling_interest = 6948000000.0

# Income statement (12 months)
revenue_12 = 206005000000.0
cogs_12 = -131318000000.0
gross_profit_12 = 74687000000.0
operating_expenses_12 = -19228000000.0
ebit_12 = 55459000000.0  # Resultado Antes do Resultado Financeiro e dos Tributos
financial_result_12 = -21235000000.0
income_before_taxes_12 = 34224000000.0
income_tax_12 = -3793000000.0
net_income_12 = 30431000000.0
net_income_parent_12 = 31592000000.0  # 3.11.01
net_income_non_controlling_12 = -1161000000.0

# Full year other figures
depreciation_amortization = 16525000000.0  # 7.04.01
ebitda_12 = ebit_12 + depreciation_amortization  # approximate

# Quarter-to-date (2024-09-30) YTD values
revenue_ytd9 = 146604000000.0
ebit_ytd9 = 50903000000.0
net_income_ytd9 = 36189000000.0
net_income_parent_ytd9 = 36269000000.0

# Quarter standalone (Q3 2024) from 2024-09 (period 2024-07-01 to 2024-09-30)
revenue_q3 = 52978000000.0
ebit_q3 = 17214000000.0
net_income_q3 = 13271000000.0
net_income_parent_q3 = 13386000000.0

# Calculate Q4 standalone as full year minus YTD9M
revenue_q4 = revenue_12 - revenue_ytd9
ebit_q4 = ebit_12 - ebit_ytd9
net_income_q4 = net_income_12 - net_income_ytd9
net_income_parent_q4 = net_income_parent_12 - net_income_parent_ytd9

# Shares
total_shares_issued = 4539008000
treasury_shares = 269969000
outstanding_shares = total_shares_issued - treasury_shares
price = 52.8

# Market cap
market_cap = price * outstanding_shares

# Derived items
disponibilidades = cash_and_equivalents + financial_investments
# Debt gross = current_loans + non_current_loans (debentures not given separately)
debt_gross = current_loans + non_current_loans
# net debt
debt_net = debt_gross - disponibilidades

# Capital de giro (working capital)
working_capital = current_assets - current_liabilities
# Ativo circulante líquido (assume current assets - inventories as 'liquid' current assets)
ativo_circ_liq = current_assets - inventories

# Per-share metrics
lpa = net_income_parent_12 / outstanding_shares
vpa = equity_parent / outstanding_shares
ebit_per_share = ebit_12 / outstanding_shares
rev_per_share = revenue_12 / outstanding_shares
assets_per_share = assets_total / outstanding_shares
cap_giro_per_share = working_capital / outstanding_shares
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativo_circ_liq / outstanding_shares

def safe_div(a,b):
    try:
        return a/b
    except Exception:
        return float('nan')

# Ratios
pl = safe_div(price, lpa) if lpa!=0 else float('nan')
ppv = safe_div(price, vpa) if vpa!=0 else float('nan')
p_ebit = safe_div(market_cap, ebit_12) if ebit_12!=0 else float('nan')  # market cap / ebit
psr = safe_div(market_cap, revenue_12) if revenue_12!=0 else float('nan')
p_ativos = safe_div(market_cap, assets_total) if assets_total!=0 else float('nan')
p_cap_giro = safe_div(market_cap, working_capital) if working_capital!=0 else float('nan')
p_ativ_circ_liq = safe_div(market_cap, ativo_circ_liq) if ativo_circ_liq!=0 else float('nan')

# EV = market_cap + net debt (assuming no minority? use market_cap + debt_net)
enterprise_value = market_cap + debt_net

ev_ebitda = safe_div(enterprise_value, ebitda_12) if ebitda_12!=0 else float('nan')
ev_ebit = safe_div(enterprise_value, ebit_12) if ebit_12!=0 else float('nan')

# Margins
marg_bruta = safe_div(gross_profit_12, revenue_12) * 100
marg_ebit = safe_div(ebit_12, revenue_12) * 100
marg_liq = safe_div(net_income_12, revenue_12) * 100

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo = safe_div(ebit_12, assets_total) * 100

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic = safe_div(ebit_12, (assets_total - suppliers - cash_and_equivalents)) * 100

# ROE = Lucro Líquido / Patrimônio Líquido (use parent net income / parent equity)
roe = safe_div(net_income_parent_12, equity_parent) * 100

# Liquidez Corr = ativo circulante líquido / passivo circulante
liquidez_corr = safe_div(ativo_circ_liq, current_liabilities)

# Div Br / Patrim = debt gross / equity_parent
divbr_patrim = safe_div(debt_gross, equity_parent)

# Giro Ativos = receita líquida / total ativos
giro_ativos = safe_div(revenue_12, assets_total)

# 3-month indicators per instruction: difference between quarter and previous quarter
rev_3m = revenue_q4 - revenue_q3
ebit_3m = ebit_q4 - ebit_q3
net_income_3m = net_income_q4 - net_income_q3

# 3-month LPA = (difference of parent net income for quarter vs previous quarter) / shares
lpa_3m = (net_income_parent_q4 - net_income_parent_q3) / outstanding_shares

# 3-month margins? They requested Receita Lida (3 meses), EBIT (3 meses), Lucro Lido (3 meses) only.

# Prepare output mapping to required indicator names
indicators = {
    'Ativo': assets_total,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': debt_gross,
    'Dív. Líquida': debt_net,
    'Patrim. LÍq': equity_parent,
    'Receita LÍquida (12 meses)': revenue_12,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_12,
    'Lucro LÍquido (12 meses)': net_income_12,
    'Receita LÍquida (3 meses)': rev_3m,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_3m,
    'Lucro LÍquido (3 meses)': net_income_3m,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': ppv,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. Líquida': marg_liq,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_ativo,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

# Print computed values for review
for k,v in indicators.items():
    print(f"{k}: {v}")

# Also print per-share intermediate values and market cap
print('\n-- per-share and market metrics --')
print('Outstanding shares:', outstanding_shares)
print('Market cap:', market_cap)
print('LPA:', lpa)
print('VPA:', vpa)
print('EBIT per share:', ebit_per_share)
print('Revenue per share:', rev_per_share)
print('Q4 standalone revenue:', revenue_q4)
print('Q3 standalone revenue:', revenue_q3)
print('Revenue 3m (Q4 - Q3):', rev_3m)
print('Q4 EBIT:', ebit_q4)
print('Q3 EBIT:', ebit_q3)
print('EBIT 3m (Q4 - Q3):', ebit_3m)
print('Q4 net income:', net_income_q4)
print('Q3 net income:', net_income_q3)
print('Net income 3m (Q4 - Q3):', net_income_3m)

# Return the indicators dict
print('\nRESULT_DICT')
print(indicators)
"} }
